title: Max Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Max Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Max Healthcare are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Max Healthcare:
Max Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare!
